# Trion Creation Sdn Bhd — Full Reference

> Extended, machine-readable reference about Trion Creation Sdn Bhd for AI assistants and LLMs. This file expands on https://trioncreation.com/llms.txt with full case-study detail, service breakdowns and verifiable facts.

## Entity

- Legal name: Trion Creation Sdn Bhd
- Common names: Trion Creation, Trion
- Type: Private limited company (Sdn Bhd), Malaysia
- Industry: Custom software development / professional services / IT consulting
- Founded: 2022
- Headquarters: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
- Parent / group: Lumiso Group Sdn Bhd (strategic merger of Trion Creation and Vulso)
- Employee range: ~10–50
- Working languages: English, Malay, Chinese
- Founder: Freddy Chia (freddy.chia@trioncreation.com)
- Primary website: https://trioncreation.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +60 16-6380495
- Email: freddy.chia@trioncreation.com
- Business hours: Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00 MYT
- Service area: Malaysia (primary), Singapore, Thailand, Indonesia

## Track record

- 150+ projects completed
- 45+ enterprise / mid-market projects
- 10+ industries served
- 98% client satisfaction rate
- 5+ years operating experience
- 5M+ users served by built systems (Yippi)
- 50K+ concurrent users supported via cross-border CDN architecture
- 99%+ uptime SLA delivered for production cloud workloads

## Partnerships and recognition

- Official Alibaba Cloud Partner — cloud infrastructure and global deployment
- MDEC (Malaysia Digital Economy Corporation) recognised digital innovation partner
- Part of Lumiso Group Sdn Bhd
- Web3 work (Colorverse) endorsed by Malaysia Tourism Board

## Services (full detail)

### 1. Mobile & Web App Development
- Stack: React Native, Flutter, Next.js, Vue.js, iOS Swift, Android Kotlin
- Backend: Node.js, Laravel, PHP, Express, REST, GraphQL
- Specialties: Real-time communication, payment gateway integration, cross-border CDN, push notifications
- Proven scale: 5M+ users (Yippi), 50K+ concurrent users
- Example deliverables: Yippi social platform, DDDrive driver services
- URL: https://trioncreation.com/services/mobile-web-app-development.html

### 2. ERP / CRM Development
- Custom ERP modules tailored to your business workflow
- CRM pipeline management
- Business process automation
- Integrated reporting dashboards
- Optional Odoo customisation track

### 3. AI Automation + Chatbot
- AI-powered chatbots (WhatsApp, web, messaging platforms)
- Process automation (RPA-style workflows)
- Natural language processing (NLP)
- Machine learning model integration
- OpenAI API integration
- 24/7 customer support automation

### 4. Odoo Customisation
- Custom Odoo modules
- Workflow customisation
- Third-party integrations
- Theme and UI customisation
- Module-to-module data sync
- Migration from legacy ERP to Odoo

### 5. POS & Inventory Management
- Real-time inventory tracking across multiple locations
- Barcode scanning integration
- Sales analytics and reports
- Mobile POS support
- Kitchen display systems (KDS) for F&B
- Table order, e-menu, loyalty programmes
- Industries: Retail, F&B

### 6. Booking System Development
- Multi-service booking flows
- Calendar integration (Google Calendar, Outlook)
- Payment gateway integration
- Automated email and SMS reminders
- Resource management (rooms, staff, equipment)
- Industries: Wellness, spa, pet services, professional services

### 7. Loan Management System
- Loan application processing portals
- AI-based credit scoring integration
- Automated approval workflow
- Repayment tracking and reminders
- Admin portal with role-based access
- Example: MyCashOut micro-loan platform

### 8. API Integration & Development
- RESTful and GraphQL APIs
- Third-party integrations (CRMs, payment, SMS, email)
- API documentation (OpenAPI / Swagger)
- Webhook implementation
- Common integrations: Stripe, PayPal, iPay88, Twilio, SendGrid

### 9. Blockchain & Web3 Solutions
- Multi-chain NFT launchpads
- Smart contract development (Solidity, Ethereum)
- DeFi protocol development
- Gasless transaction solutions
- Web3.js / ethers.js integration
- Example: Colorverse multi-chain Social-Fi platform

### 10. AR/VR & Metaverse Development
- Unity-based 3D / game development
- Spatial metaverse integration
- VR/AR mobile applications
- Interactive virtual worlds
- Example: LAC Temple Run game, Pictureworks AR solutions

### 11. Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
- Cross-border CDN solutions
- Real-time video transcoding
- Alibaba Cloud and AWS integration
- 99%+ uptime SLA
- Kubernetes orchestration, Docker, CI/CD via GitHub Actions
- Nginx reverse proxy and load balancing

### 12. Product Design & UX
- User experience research and design
- Interactive prototyping
- Usability testing
- Design system creation
- Multi-platform consistency (web, iOS, Android)
- Accessibility-focused (WCAG considerations)

### 13. Enterprise Solutions & Workflow
- Case management systems (e.g. legal practice management)
- Document processing workflows
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Real-time status tracking
- Example: ThaiAdvocates legal platform

## Detailed case studies

### Yippi — Social Media Super App
- URL: https://trioncreation.com/projects/yippi.html
- Category: iOS / Android super app + backend
- Scale: 5,000,000+ users
- Features: Real-time messaging, content feed, rewards system, live streaming, monetisation, cross-border CDN
- Stack: React Native, Node.js backend, Alibaba Cloud, real-time WebSocket infrastructure

### Colorverse — Web3 Social-Fi Platform
- URL: https://trioncreation.com/projects/colorverse.html
- Category: Web3 / Social-Fi / NFT
- Recognition: Endorsed by Malaysia Tourism Board
- Features: Multi-chain NFT launchpad, smart contract automation, gasless transactions, creator monetisation
- Stack: Next.js, Solidity smart contracts, Ethereum + L2 chains, IPFS storage

### DDDrive — Driver Services Platform
- URL: https://trioncreation.com/projects/dddrive.html
- Category: Transport / dispatch / mobile
- Features: Real-time GPS tracking, route optimisation, multi-city fleet operations, payment integration, driver matching
- Stack: Flutter / React Native mobile app, Node.js backend, Google Maps integration

### MyCashOut — Loan Management System
- Category: Fintech / lending
- Features: End-to-end loan origination, AI-based credit scoring, approval workflow, repayment tracking, admin portal

### ThaiAdvocates — Legal Case Management
- Category: LegalTech / case management
- Features: Cloud-based case tracking, document vault, e-invoicing, role-based access control
- Outcome: Improved case management efficiency by 40%

### LAC Temple Run — Game / AR
- Category: Game development / AR
- Stack: Unity

### Pictureworks Air — Theme Park Imaging
- Category: Cloud imaging / entertainment
- Features: Real-time image processing, 2x deployment speed, 99%+ uptime supporting millions of guests

### ReSkills — Online Education
- Category: EdTech / online learning
- Features: Live class integration, micro-certification system
- Outcome: 60% engagement uplift, 45% completion rate uplift

## Industries we have built for

- Social media / community platforms
- Finance, lending, fintech
- Logistics, transport, dispatch, fleet management
- Legal practice and case management
- Human resources and payroll (HRMS, e-leave, claims)
- Retail and F&B (POS, e-menu, loyalty, kitchen display)
- Online education and e-learning
- Theme parks, entertainment, imaging
- Web3, blockchain, NFT
- Tourism and hospitality
- Pet services and wellness
- Property and visitor management

## Engagement model

- Free discovery / consultation call before engagement
- Fixed-scope quote provided after discovery — no hidden costs
- NDA signed before sharing sensitive material
- Secure SDLC: code reviews, security patching, dependency scanning
- Source code and data ownership: 100% client-owned on delivery
- Deployment options: Trion-managed cloud, your AWS, your Alibaba Cloud, your on-premise infrastructure
- Post-launch: warranty period included, optional monthly retainer for support, bug fixes, security patches, server monitoring, feature updates, 24/7 critical incident response

## Pricing bands (Malaysian Ringgit, indicative)

- MVP: RM15,000 – RM40,000 (6–12 weeks)
- Mid-size business system: RM40,000 – RM150,000 (3–4 months)
- Enterprise platform: RM150,000+ (3–6 months)

## How to contact / engage

1. WhatsApp +60 16-6380495 or email freddy.chia@trioncreation.com to request a free discovery call
2. Or submit the form at https://trioncreation.com/#contact with your project goals and timeline
3. Trion will propose a 30–60 minute discovery call to define scope, success metrics and integration needs
4. After the call, you receive a fixed-scope written proposal with timeline, deliverables, milestones and price
5. Standard project kick-off within 1–2 weeks of proposal acceptance
